texto: Nations need to constantly reaffirm their historical roots to maintain their political ideals. Motion pictures were one of the media used by nations to accommplish this task. The question one must ask is: Did the colonial films made faithfully represent the period in our nation's history?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de John P. Harty Jr. que provoca temas ligados a fe. Ao questionar “Nations need to constantly reaffirm their historical roots to maintain their political ideals. Mo…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre fe, american-history, film, com foco em film e film-industry.

The question one must ask is: Did the colonial films made faithfully represent the period in our nation's history?

texto: The colonial films of the golden age of Hollywood were a clear proclamation of the Consensus historians' interpretation of the facts. These motion pictures encouraged audiences to believe that our nation could overcome all obstacles to its growth and defend itself against any future foreign aggression.
